result.stdout:
Description:
  CodeCompress CLI — Compressed, symbol-level code access. Saves 80-90% tokens vs reading raw files.
  
  Recommended Workflow:
    1. index        Build/update the symbol database (run first)
    2. outline      Get a compressed codebase overview
    3. search       Find symbols using FTS5 full-text search
    4. get-symbol   Retrieve exact source code by name
  

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --json          Output as JSON instead of human-readable format
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  index               Index a project to build a searchable symbol database. Must be run before any query commands. Re-running performs an incremental update — only changed files are re-parsed.
  outline             Show a compressed project outline with symbol signatures. Far more efficient than reading files individually. Requires index.
  get-symbol          Retrieve the full source code of a specific symbol by name. Loads only the symbol, not the whole file — saves 80%+ tokens. Requires index.
  search              Search the symbol index using FTS5 full-text search. Faster and more precise than grep. Requires index.
  search-text         Search raw file contents using FTS5 full-text search. Use for string literals, comments, or non-symbol patterns. Requires index.
  changes             Show what changed since a named snapshot: new, modified, and deleted files. Use snapshot to set a baseline first. Requires index.
  snapshot            Create a named snapshot of the current index state. Use before making changes, then run 'changes' to see what changed. Requires index.
  file-tree           Show an annotated directory tree with file counts. Does NOT require index — reads the filesystem directly.
  deps                Show the import/require dependency graph. Shows which files depend on which others. Requires index.
  invalidate-cache    Delete the entire index for a project, forcing a full re-index on the next index command.
  get-module-api      Get the full public API surface of a single file — symbols, signatures, and dependencies. Requires index.
  expand-symbol       Retrieve only a nested symbol's body without loading the parent class — saves ~60% tokens. Requires index.
  get-symbols         Batch retrieve source code for multiple symbols in one call. More efficient than repeated get-symbol. Requires index.
  topic-outline       Search for symbols related to a topic and return results in outline format. Requires index.
  project-deps        Show inter-project dependency relationships in a .NET solution. Requires index.
  find-references     Find all locations where a symbol is referenced across the codebase. Faster than grep. Requires index.
  assemble            Assemble relevant code context within a token budget. Combines search + source retrieval + file overview in one call. Requires index.
  agent-instructions  Output a block of text optimized for pasting into CLAUDE.md, system prompts, or agent configuration files. Tells AI agents how to use the CodeCompress CLI for code discovery.

commands.payload:
Description:
  CodeCompress CLI — Compressed, symbol-level code access. Saves 80-90% tokens vs reading raw files.
  
  Recommended Workflow:
    1. index        Build/update the symbol database (run first)
    2. outline      Get a compressed codebase overview
    3. search       Find symbols using FTS5 full-text search
    4. get-symbol   Retrieve exact source code by name
  

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --json          Output as JSON instead of human-readable format
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  index               Index a project to build a searchable symbol database. Must be run before any query commands. Re-running performs an incremental update — only changed files are re-parsed.
  outline             Show a compressed project outline with symbol signatures. Far more efficient than reading files individually. Requires index.
  get-symbol          Retrieve the full source code of a specific symbol by name. Loads only the symbol, not the whole file — saves 80%+ tokens. Requires index.
  search              Search the symbol index using FTS5 full-text search. Faster and more precise than grep. Requires index.
  search-text         Search raw file contents using FTS5 full-text search. Use for string literals, comments, or non-symbol patterns. Requires index.
  changes             Show what changed since a named snapshot: new, modified, and deleted files. Use snapshot to set a baseline first. Requires index.
  snapshot            Create a named snapshot of the current index state. Use before making changes, then run 'changes' to see what changed. Requires index.
  file-tree           Show an annotated directory tree with file counts. Does NOT require index — reads the filesystem directly.
  deps                Show the import/require dependency graph. Shows which files depend on which others. Requires index.
  invalidate-cache    Delete the entire index for a project, forcing a full re-index on the next index command.
  get-module-api      Get the full public API surface of a single file — symbols, signatures, and dependencies. Requires index.
  expand-symbol       Retrieve only a nested symbol's body without loading the parent class — saves ~60% tokens. Requires index.
  get-symbols         Batch retrieve source code for multiple symbols in one call. More efficient than repeated get-symbol. Requires index.
  topic-outline       Search for symbols related to a topic and return results in outline format. Requires index.
  project-deps        Show inter-project dependency relationships in a .NET solution. Requires index.
  find-references     Find all locations where a symbol is referenced across the codebase. Faster than grep. Requires index.
  assemble            Assemble relevant code context within a token budget. Combines search + source retrieval + file overview in one call. Requires index.
  agent-instructions  Output a block of text optimized for pasting into CLAUDE.md, system prompts, or agent configuration files. Tells AI agents how to use the CodeCompress CLI for code discovery.

Description:
  Output a block of text optimized for pasting into CLAUDE.md, system prompts, or agent configuration files. Tells AI agents how to use the CodeCompress CLI for code discovery.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli agent-instructions [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --json          Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Assemble relevant code context within a token budget. Combines search + source retrieval + file overview in one call. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli assemble [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --query <query> (REQUIRED)   Task description or search terms (e.g., 'authentication middleware')
  --active-file <active-file>  Relative path to the file you're editing — gets highest priority
  --budget <budget>            Maximum token budget (1000-200000, default 40000). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 40000]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show the import/require dependency graph. Shows which files depend on which others. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli deps [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Absolute path to the project root directory
  --file <file>             Start from a specific file (relative path)
  --direction <direction>   Traversal direction. Allowed values: 'dependencies' (outgoing), 'dependents' (incoming), 'both' (default). Other values rejected. [default: both]
  --depth <depth>           Maximum traversal depth (1-50, default 3). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 3]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --json                    Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

  --direction <direction>   Traversal direction. Allowed values: 'dependencies' (outgoing), 'dependents' (incoming), 'both' (default). Other values rejected. [default: both]
  --depth <depth>           Maximum traversal depth (1-50, default 3). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 3]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --json                    Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Retrieve only a nested symbol's body without loading the parent class — saves ~60% tokens. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli expand-symbol [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Absolute path to the project root directory
  --name <name> (REQUIRED)  Symbol name — accepts qualified 'Parent:Child' (e.g., MyClass:MyMethod) or unqualified names. Unqualified names are resolved automatically.
  --context                 Include 3 lines of context before and after the symbol
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --json                    Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Find all locations where a symbol is referenced across the codebase. Faster than grep. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli find-references [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --name <name> (REQUIRED)     Symbol name to search for references (e.g., 'ISymbolStore')
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter results to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')
  --limit <limit>              Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get the full public API surface of a single file — symbols, signatures, and dependencies. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli get-module-api [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)      Absolute path to the project root directory
  --module <module> (REQUIRED)  Relative path to the module file (e.g., src/Core/Foo.cs). Forward slashes only.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  --json                        Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

Description:
  Batch retrieve source code for multiple symbols in one call. More efficient than repeated get-symbol. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli get-symbols [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)    Absolute path to the project root directory
  --names <names> (REQUIRED)  Comma-separated list of qualified symbol names (max 50). Same format as get-symbol.
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information
  --json                      Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show a compressed project outline with symbol signatures. Far more efficient than reading files individually. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli outline [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --group-by <group-by>        Grouping strategy. Allowed values: 'file' (default), 'kind', 'directory'. Other values rejected. [default: file]
  --include-private            Include private/local symbols
  --max-depth <max-depth>      Limit directory traversal depth (null for unlimited)
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')
  --max-symbols <max-symbols>  Maximum symbols to return (1-5000, default 500). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 500]
  --offset <offset>            Number of symbols to skip for pagination [default: 0]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show inter-project dependency relationships in a .NET solution. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli project-deps [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Absolute path to the project root directory
  --filter <filter>         Filter to projects whose name contains this string (case-insensitive)
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --json                    Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search the symbol index using FTS5 full-text search. Faster and more precise than grep. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli search [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --query <query> (REQUIRED)   FTS5 search query (supports AND, OR, NOT, prefix*, *contains*)
  --kind <kind>                Filter by symbol kind (function, method, class, record, enum, type, interface, export, constant, module)
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')
  --limit <limit>              Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.payload:

  --query <query> (REQUIRED)   FTS5 search query (supports AND, OR, NOT, prefix*, *contains*)
  --kind <kind>                Filter by symbol kind (function, method, class, record, enum, type, interface, export, constant, module)
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')
  --limit <limit>              Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search raw file contents using FTS5 full-text search. Use for string literals, comments, or non-symbol patterns. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli search-text [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --query <query> (REQUIRED)   FTS5 search query for raw file contents
  --glob <glob>                File pattern filter (e.g., *.cs, src/services/*.lua)
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')
  --limit <limit>              Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

  --label <label>           Human-readable label (auto-generated if omitted)
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
  --json                    Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search for symbols related to a topic and return results in outline format. Requires index.

Usage:
  CodeCompress.Cli topic-outline [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)     Absolute path to the project root directory
  --topic <topic> (REQUIRED)   Topic or keyword to search for (e.g., 'authentication', 'database')
  --path-filter <path-filter>  Filter results to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/Core/')
  --max-results <max-results>  Maximum symbols to return (1-200, default 50). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 50]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --json                       Output as JSON instead of human-readable format
